name: Breast of Chicken with Pecan Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 whole boneless chicken breasts (skin on), halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken breasts with lemon pepper, Italian seasoning, and salt.
2. Place skin-side up in a lightly oiled 13x9-inch baking dish.
3. Pour butter over the chicken.
4. Bake at 400°F for 20-30 minutes or until no longer pink inside.
5. Remove from the oven and preheat the broiler for 5 minutes.
6. Transfer the chicken to a plate and add wine to the baking dish, stirring and scraping browned bits from the bottom of the dish.
7. Return the chicken to the baking dish and broil for 3-5 minutes or until browned.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with parsley. Let cool, cover, and chill in the refrigerator.
9. Serve with pecan chutney.
